graduation_eligibility_reason: Pressure alone never graduates the system. Graduation requires full constitutional execution.
must_not_claim: Pressure state does not certify correctness, truth, compliance, legitimacy, morality, readiness, or graduation.
HIGH or CRITICAL pressure does not create automatic graduation eligibility.
Graduation requires successor-led execution, founder silence, replay success, and invariants_broken: 0.
This file is static and read-only. It does not confer institutional authority.
